name: the-coddling-of-the-american-mind
description: Greg Lukianoff and Jonathan Haidt's The Coddling of the American Mind — understand the Three Great Untruths weakening resilience, apply CBT principles to challenge distorted thinking, and foster antifragility in education and culture
useCase: Helps parents, educators, and anyone concerned about resilience understand how safetyism, emotional reasoning, and polarization are harming young people — and how CBT principles can restore antifragility.
knownRisks: The book presents a specific cultural analysis that some may find controversial
